calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Deft Howthview, Inc.'S Answer To Complt Or Alternatively, Render A Default Judgment Against Howthview, Inc. And An Order Imposing Additional Sanctions And Atty Fees
Off Calendar May-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Cooks Company Produce, Inc.'s Motion To Strike Defendant's Answer To Complaint, or in the alternative, To Render A Default Judgment Against Howthview, Inc. And An Order Imposing Additional Sanctions and Attorney Fees is denied as no previous order to respond to discovery has been made. As no notice has been given that this motion seeks anything except the unavailable remedy, the court cannot make any other orders. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
